name: My Ambulance
original_name: รักฉุดใจนายฉุกเฉิน
overview: Peng, an emergency room resident and Tantawan have been in love for 15 years. Tantawan, who owns magical power, starts to doubt whether Peng still loves her. One day, they met a traffic accident and Tantawan is seriously injured. When she wakes up, she loses all her memories. Unbeknownst to her, the truth about the accident was hidden.

trailers.title: รักฉุดใจนายฉุกเฉิน My Ambulance [OFFICIAL TRAILER] | นาดาว บางกอก
